Explanation:
We are looking for the earliest year where the album column is not “single only” or “singles only.” 
- 1957: single only (not eligible)
- 1961: language of love (eligible)
- 1962: twelve sides (eligible but later than 1961)
All other non-single-only albums occur in later years. Therefore, the oldest qualifying album is “language of love” from 1961.
